productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Black & Grey Check Shirt
description: Style Note Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from locomotive. The Fit enhances your figure while the look oozes easy charm. Team this with jeans and sports shoes on a day out with friends or with leather shoes and a cool jacket for an evening date to create an excellent impression.  Product Details Black, grey and white check shirt, has a slim spread collar, full buttoned placket, back yoke, buttoned tabs on the shoulder, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, two mid arm buttoned tabs to fold the sleeves as per desired length, pocket on the left chest, branding embroidered above the left chest, branding above the hemline in front and curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry normal Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M Style NoteProudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from Locomotive.
